profile.description: I'm Edison Tezolin, a full-stack developer blending technology with human-centered design. I create scalable, user-focused solutions, always aiming to deliver meaningful results. Technology is not just a tool—it's a way to turn ideas into reality.

mainContent.firstParagraph: At the intersection of computational logic and philosophical inquiry, we find a developer who navigates between algorithms and questions of human thought. With a background in Systems Analysis and Development and Philosophy, my professional journey explores how these two disciplines complement each other in a unique way.
mainContent.secondParagraph: As a former teacher and full-stack developer, I apply philosophical critical thinking to create solutions that not only work, but also deeply consider the human experience. I believe that each line of code is an opportunity to materialize ideas into tangible solutions.
mainContent.anecdote: Speaking of combining technology and philosophy, once I was explaining while loops using Camus's Myth of Sisyphus as an analogy, saying: "Imagine Sisyphus programming — he would embody the perfect infinite loop!" A confused student asked: "Professor, wouldn't it be easier for him to use a break statement instead of pushing the rock eternally?" Sometimes, even existential dilemmas can be solved with a bit of programming!

details.degree: Technology in Systems Analysis and Development
details.skills: Software Development, Database Design, System Architecture
details.projects: Educational Platforms, Integration Systems, RPA Solutions, Data Processing, APIs Development Services, System Architecture Design

details.thesis: The Intersection of Technology and Human Consciousness

experience.title: Experience
experience.summary: As a full-stack developer specialized in .NET/C# backend and React/TypeScript frontend, I focus on creating scalable integration solutions and multi-platform systems for the education sector, combining technical expertise with thoughtful problem-solving approaches.

backend.title: Backend Development
skills: Building robust RESTful APIs using .NET Core and C#
Implementing layered architecture with DDD principles
Applying design patterns and SOLID principles

frontend.title: Frontend Development
skills: Creating modern SPAs using React and TypeScript
Building responsive interfaces with reusable components
Implementing Redux and Context API state management
